summary: Iteration 25 - React Flow Interactive Network Map Feature Validation. Both backend and frontend testing completed successfully. Backend topology layout save/reset endpoints work correctly. Frontend React Flow map renders with 9 nodes, drag-and-drop works, save/reset layout functionality works, and 'Layout personalizzato' badge appears/disappears correctly.

backend_topology_layout_api: Response has required fields: nodes, edges, health, has_custom_layout, client_id, client_name
All endpoints require authentication (return 401/403 without token)
frontend_react_flow_map: View mode toggle (Lista/Mappa) visible and functional
Click Mappa switches to React Flow map view
Network map container visible with data-testid='network-map'
React Flow canvas renders with 9 nodes (Internet + 8 devices)
Toolbar buttons visible: Modifica, Auto, Reset, Salva Layout
Save Layout button enables after dragging (green color)
Click Save Layout shows 'Layout salvato con successo!' toast
Legend shows connection types: WAN, Trunk, Accesso, Server, MGMT, Manuale

critical_code_review_comments: React Flow v12 (@xyflow/react) implementation is correct with proper node types and edge styling
Custom DeviceNode component renders device info with status indicators and handles
Layout save/reset uses MongoDB collection 'topology_layouts' correctly
Auto-layout algorithm uses layer-based positioning for hierarchical display
Connection mode toggle allows adding/removing edges manually
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing 86BIT_Office client with 8 devices
context_for_next_testing_agent: React Flow interactive network map feature fully validated. Backend endpoints: GET /api/network/topology/{client_id} returns graph with has_custom_layout flag, POST .../layout saves custom positions, DELETE .../layout resets to auto-inferred. Frontend uses @xyflow/react v12 with custom DeviceNode component. Map shows 9 nodes (Internet + 8 devices) with hierarchical layout. Drag-and-drop, save, reset all work. 'Layout personalizzato' badge indicates custom layout state.
